label: AquaMonitor RTDB - Sensor
info: MQTT sensor to RTDB live data, sampled history, and automatic actuator rules.

label: AquaMonitor RTDB - Actuator
info: RTDB listeners cache sensor and actuator configuration. Commands are sent to Arduino and logged.

name: ESP publishes { value } to aquaponics/sensors/<sensorId>
info: Sensor threshold logic is deliberately absent. Thresholds belong to /actuators/<id>/automation.

name: Prepare live + history + automation
Store actual actuator state
Cache rules + web RPC + safety OFF
Cache sensor states
func:
if (msg.payload && typeof msg.payload === 'object') flow.set('sensors', msg.payload);
return null;

name: Apply auto threshold + hysteresis
Log web command (do not republish)
MQTT command + RTDB state + log
